data.title: Marriagetoxin
data.synopsis:
For centuries, the Poison Masters have perfected the art of assassination. Among them, the Gero family stands as one of the five most powerful families of Masters, wielding unmatched skill and influence. Hikaru Gero, heir to this infamous bloodline, has lived his life deep in the shadows of the underworld, far removed from love or marriage.

However, to ensure the Poison Master bloodline does not die out, the head of the Gero family declares that Hikaru's sister will be forced to bear an heir. Soon after, Hikaru crosses paths with Mei Kinosaki, a brilliant marriage swindler who also happens to be his current assassination target. Determined to protect his sister and solve the succession problem himself, Hikaru makes an unexpected request on the spot—asking Mei to help him get married.

"...That's the first time anyone's ever proposed like that."

And so, with the cunning marriage swindler Mei as his advisor, the elite assassin Hikaru sets out on the toughest mission for love. His goal? The ultimate marriage. The most unlikely duo—an assassin and a marriage swindler—take on the world's toughest mission for love!

(Source: Official site)
data.background: Marriagetoxin aired on Kansai TV and Fuji TV's Ka-Anival!! block.

titles.title: Otaku ni Yasashii Gal wa Inai!?
オタクに優しいギャルはいない!?
Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!?

data.title: Otaku ni Yasashii Gal wa Inai!?
data.title_english: Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!?
data.title_japanese: オタクに優しいギャルはいない!?
data.synopsis:
Meet Takuya Seo, an otaku who sits behind the popular gals in class, Ijichi and Amane. Since they're people from different "castes," you wouldn't expect them to have much in common. But when their worlds collide over a borrowed eraser, Takuya slips up about his favorite anime, and Amane...is rather quick to correct him. She says she's not a fan, but her familiarity with the series suggests otherwise. Could she be...a fellow geek?!

(Source: Yen Press)
data.background: Otaku ni Yasashii Gal wa Inai!? aired on TV Asahi's IMAnimation W block.

data.title: Matsurika Kanriden
data.synopsis:
Matsurika, a lady-in-waiting in the imperial palace, has a special talent—an excellent memory. One day, she is asked to act as a practice partner for a nobleman's arranged meeting, only to discover that her partner is none other than Emperor Hakuyou himself, who wished to try a matchmaking meeting. Impressed by her skill, the emperor unexpectedly tells her to "go pass the imperial examination first." Thus begins the tale of a girl singled out by the emperor in this Chinese-style Cinderella story.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Apprentice Nail Artist in a Foreign Land
Apprentice Nail Painter in a Foreign Land

data.title: Ikyou no Tsume Nuri Minarai
title_synonyms: Apprentice Nail Artist in a Foreign Land
Apprentice Nail Painter in a Foreign Land
data.synopsis:
Keiko Sahara, an office worker with a hobby in gel nails, is suddenly transported to a world where magic is used through nails. In this world, "Nail Painters" create spells by painting magical materials onto nails. By chance, Keiko becomes a nail painter apprentice and begins a new life in this other world, working alongside eccentric master sorcerer Rocco, his apprentice Hou, and her nail painting mentor Lido. This is a workplace fantasy about her journey as a nail painter in a magical realm.

(Source: MAL News)

data.title: Youchien Wars
data.synopsis:
Kindergarten Noir is widely known as the world's safest kindergarten. Attended by the children of wealthy and notable figures, its defenses are seemingly impenetrable, even though assassination attempts are a big part of the daily routine. However, the teachers of the kindergarten are far from ordinary—they are all convicted criminals trying to reduce their sentences.

The recently joined legendary assassin named Rita is no different. According to her contract, she must work as a teacher for a full year to be released. Rita quickly proves her worth with unmatched combat skills, but even the notorious assassin has a weakness: she longs for a handsome boyfriend, which leaves her vulnerable in combat when faced with a particularly attractive opponent. Rita and her colleagues continue to ensure the children's safety to gain freedom, but Rita never stops looking for the man of her dreams.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: てつりょー！meet with 鉄道むすめ

data.title: Tetsuryou! Meet with Tetsudou Musume
data.title_japanese: てつりょー！meet with 鉄道むすめ
data.synopsis:
Misaki, a university student, feeling the weight of everyday life and uncertain about her future, she longs for adventure and something she can be truly passionate about.

At the start of the new day on campus, members of the Travel Train Club (commonly known as the Tetsuryo Club) invite Misaki to join them, as she steps into the world of railways, Misaki's heart beats with excitement for the journey that awaits her.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Itte kara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita.
I Became a Legend a Decade Later After Telling My Comrades to Leave Everything to Me and Retreat First
ここは俺に任せて先に行けと言ってから10年がたったら伝説になっていた。
I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand.

data.title: Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Itte kara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita.
data.title_english: I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand.
data.title_japanese: ここは俺に任せて先に行けと言ってから10年がたったら伝説になっていた。
title_synonyms: I Became a Legend a Decade Later After Telling My Comrades to Leave Everything to Me and Retreat First
data.synopsis:
The sorcerer Luck believes this to be the end. Besieged by powerful demons, he makes the noble sacrifice of holding back their onslaught while his friends escape. Never sleeping or resting, Luck endures the clash of swords, rain of blood, and never-ending stream of enemies. Against all odds, he vanquishes the commander and emerges victorious, only to find that 10 whole years have passed in the meantime. Furthermore, his body has regressed in age to the point where he looks like a mere teenager.

Following his triumph, Luck soon reunites with his friends, the hero Eric Imgard Mendirival and warrior Goran Morton. As they believed Luck to be dead, the pair made sure he went down in history as a hero and prepared to quell the rise of the demons themselves, unaware of Luck's feat. With all this in mind, Luck just wants a laid-back life, so he applies as a novice adventurer under the name Lock and sets out on a journey alongside brand new companions.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Tian Xiang
data.synopsis:
Fifteen years ago, Luofeng City was struck by a bizarre catastrophe, becoming a dead and silent ruin overnight. The young Ding Xiao, born at the age of seven, was granted a place in the Town Spirit Division. However, he destroyed his own spirit and became a coffin carrier for the Gui Tribe. For five years, he experienced the vicissitudes of life. Unexpectedly, he awakened his physiognomy in the face of adversity, excelled in the promotion assessment, and became a feared figure in the Spirit Division. Now, evil spirits are rising in all directions, and strange events are endless. To cure his sister Ding Ling's increasingly strange illness, Ding Xiao resolutely restarts his spiritual awakening journey, only to be drawn into an unfathomable vortex of political intrigue. The hidden truth of Luofeng City gradually unfolds, and behind all this, the fate of Ding Ling is inextricably intertwined...

(Source: Youku, translated)
